title: Oblique
description: Stuck on a build? Get inspired!
body:
"Oblique Strategies" adapted for Minecraft as a client-side Fabric mod.

Over 100 prompts to help get you through creative blocks: some literal, some more abstract. 

Just press 'i' to pull a new prompt. Prompts are to be "trusted even if its appropriateness is quite unclear". 

A new prompt can be pulled every ten minutes...you can't rush art.
